mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_document ( tenant_id, knowledge_id, document_id, filename, file_type, file_size, minio_path, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, search_strategy_override, search_params_override_json, multi_stage_override_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{documentId}, #{filename}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{minioPath}, #{contentHash}, #{chunkCount}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{uploadedBy}, #{uploadedAt}, #{chunkStrategy}, #{chunkConfigJson}, #{searchStrategyOverride}, #{searchParamsOverrideJson}, #{multiStageOverrideJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_document SET filename = #{filename}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, minio_path = #{minioPath}, chunk_strategy = #{chunkStrategy}, chunk_config_json = #{chunkConfigJson}, search_params_override_json = #{searchParamsOverrideJson}, multi_stage_override_json = #{multiStageOverrideJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_document SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_document WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, document_id, filename, file_type, file_size, minio_path, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, search_strategy_override, search_params_override_json, multi_stage_override_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_document WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, document_id, filename, file_type, file_size, minio_path, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, search_strategy_override, search_params_override_json, multi_stage_override_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_document WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_document WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_id, document_id, filename, file_type, file_size, minio_path, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunk_strategy, chunk_config_json, search_strategy_override, search_params_override_json, multi_stage_override_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM t_document WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
